parameters: Excuse me. I've brought the budget documents for the Computer Club…
Ah, good work. I'm Sakamoto from the Student Council.
Thank you for submitting the documents within the deadline.
Ah, yes. Um… are you a first-year Student Council member？
The seniors are still visiting the clubs that haven't submitted their forms yet.
I see… Well, I've handed over the Computer Club's documents, so
I'll leave it to the Student Council President.
Yes！ So, please sign here to acknowledge receipt of the documents.
N-no, it's not that！ I knew the last name, so...
Well, there are quite a few people with the same last name in this school...
Sorry...！ I suddenly said something strange...
No, it's fine. So, about the documents, please take care of it.
Phew...now the troublesome documents are taken care of, I guess...
Still, that student council girl was really cute...
I feel like I've seen her somewhere before...
Well...since we're in the same school, it's not strange to have seen her around, right~
I wonder if I'll be able to see her again somewhere...that girl.
I want to go see it now！
Good luck with the Kyudo club's practice.
I want to go see it now！
Good luck with the Kyudo club's practice.
Maybe I'll go check out the Kyudo club now...！
You haven't been coming to school lately, are you okay？ And... that stomach of yours...！
Um... well... actually... because of what happened that day, I...
You don't have to apologize... Ayame-chan...！ I'm... happy！
Happy... really？ But... this child in my stomach...
Well... if it was because of that day... it's probably mine...
\N[0003]I wonder if it's mine or not, but...
So... shall we do a charm now？ So it's my child ♪
Ah... \N[0001]senpai...！ T-this is... the student council room, you know...！
It's okay, I told you... there are lots of desks, so we won't be easily seen...！
But... if \N[0003] comes to the student council room...！
Ah, if it's him, I don't think he'll come today？
I don't know？ He said he was going to take a day off from school...
I-I see... that's how it is...
So...it's fine, right？...It's okay to keep going like this...
T-to rub like this while talking...
I won't be able to hold back...
Huh...You're being really proactive today, aren't you, Ayame-chan♪
Mmm...ever since I found out I'm pregnant...I've been...well...
I've been unable to hold back...
I wonder if girls get horny when they're pregnant？
I-I don't know...I'm worried about the baby too...
A-and...but...it's hard to hold back too...\N[0001]...senpai...
Hehe, if you keep looking at me like that, I won't be able to hold back either...
But there's the baby in your tummy too...so...let's enjoy it slowly today...
I feel it more than usual...
Inside... it's hot... ah... ah... I can't stop...
Ugh... as soon as you put it in, I shake my hips...
Did you want my dick that badly？
\N[0003]So you haven't had sex since last time？
\N[0003]With you... I haven't done it since I found out I was pregnant...
You said it's for my body...
Despite that, today you're straddling me and sucking my big dick again？
A-ah！ B-but... you're the one who's tempting me, Senpai...
I'm sorry for being so randy...
Hehe, you don't have to apologize to me...
I actually like Ayame-chan even more when she's being erotic like this...
So... just swallow all of it... my sperm...!
I'll tell the baby in your tummy that I'm the father, okay...！
Ahh, ahh, ahh, ahh...！ You're going slow and deep...
\N[0001]I can feel the shape of your dick clearly...
Mmm... Ah... I can feel the sensation of my uterus too...
You're about to cum, aren't you？ Your dick is throbbing and tightening...！
I'm cumming... I'm going to release it soon, okay...！
Please fill me up with your cum...
Ah... It feels so good... Sex with Ayame-chan after a long time... it's the best...
Let's stay like this for a little while longer...
It's about time I headed to the family restaurant to meet Shibata.
What?! You knew about Kana-chan and \N[0001]Senpai!?
Yeah！ The other day, I wasn't paying attention and bumped into you in the hallway...！
And at that time, you helped me with filming and other things！
Even though it was my fault, thank you very much！
To think I'd run into you again here...！ It seems♪
I never thought Shibata's girlfriend was you！
Well, we've only been dating for a month！
We're going to nurture our love from now on♪
Hahaha♪ Shibata-kun is always cheerful and nice♪
Well, anyway, I'm glad to see you two getting along.
Yes♪ Ah！ By the way, if you're free, let's take some photos together at the photography club,
No, the photos of Ayabe-senpai that we took the other day, when \N[0001]-senpai showed them to the club president, they were highly praised～!
R, really... I was a bit worried because it was my first time filming...
S, so... I was, um, my first time shooting, though...
The club president was so excited that～…
I'm sure it means that Senpai has a talent for photography！！
\N[0001]Senpai is the captain of the computer club！
She won't give them to the photography club, you know～
Aww～ what a shame…！ But, please come to the photography club when you're free！
You can just call me Kana！
We're already friends from taking photos together～
Eh～？ Isn't calling me Kana-chan a boyfriend's privilege～？
You want the privilege of being my boyfriend？ Shibata-kun is！
But～ I feel like it's nice to be called that by my girlfriend…
But, my friends call me Kana, you know？ Is it still special？
So, the only man allowed to call me Kana-chan is,
\N[0001]Senpai, you're the only one I'll allow！
Yes, yes. Are you two really just one month into dating？
You two are already like an old married couple, aren't you?
Well, I and Shibata-kun are like that too, you know！
Senpai!？ You're really agreeing with that？
Fuh～, I've eaten until I'm stuffed...
You're eating too much, aren't you? Kanachan is surprised, you know.
If you're going to say that, Kanachan eats too many sweets too, you know～
Aa～, I'll get the bill, so you two just wait, okay！
Is that okay？ Sorry about that...
I invited you, so don't worry about it, okay！
Alright, I'll go pay the bill～
Hehe, Shibata-kun may be like that, but he's actually a pretty nice guy, you know！
Yeah... He's into that kind of stuff, and he's also in the computer club, isn't he?
That's right, would you like to exchange contact info？
Yeah. If you have any trouble with Shibata, it's okay to consult me, and
if anything happens with Shibata, I'll contact you too.
\N[0001]If it's a senior, Shibata-kun won't be angry if we exchange contact info, right！
I exchanged contact information with Suzumoto Kana.
Sorry to keep you waiting～We're done with the bill, so shall we disband！
Yeah. Well, I'm heading towards the station...
Yes！ Well, see you at school again, nice to meet you！
Well, Kana-chan is going in the same direction as me, so shall we go?
Suzumoto Kana-chan...she's a lively girl, but she's cute and a nice kid.
